seo_title: Services & Amenities | Los Cab Sports Club — Fountain Valley, CA
seo_description: Explore the premium amenities at Los Cab — Olympic-sized pool, steam rooms, saunas, pro shop, and courtyard cabanas in Fountain Valley, CA.
hero_subtitle: Beyond the courts and the gym, Los Cab offers a suite of premium amenities designed for relaxation and convenience.

featured_services.title: Gem Day Spa
featured_services.desc: Our boutique on-site spa offers a curated menu of non-invasive facial and body procedures in an elegant, relaxing environment. From rejuvenating facials to body treatments — Gem Day Spa is your escape after a great workout.

featured_services.title: Sol Vida OC — Los Cab Café
featured_services.desc: Our on-site café "Sol Vida OC" is now open for a soft opening. Grab a coffee, smoothie, salad, sandwich, bagel, or snack before or after your workout. Fresh, delicious fuel to power your day.

featured_services.title: Teak Catering
featured_services.desc: Full-service event catering led by Chef Pierre. Whether you're hosting a corporate event, wedding reception, club tournament, or private party — Teak Catering delivers exceptional culinary experiences.

featured_services.title: Timeless Venues
featured_services.desc: Our 4,000 sq. ft. versatile event space "Timeless Venues" is perfect for weddings, corporate meetings, galas, tournaments, and private celebrations. A stunning backdrop for any occasion.

amenities.title: Premium Locker Rooms
amenities.desc: Spacious, well-maintained locker rooms with premium shower facilities for all members — men's and women's.

amenities.title: Steam & Sauna Rooms
amenities.desc: Brand-new steam rooms and sauna rooms added in Winter 2026. Perfect for post-workout recovery.

amenities.title: Co-Ed Jacuzzi
amenities.desc: A relaxing co-ed jacuzzi available to all members. Great for unwinding after a game or workout.

amenities.title: Cabanas
amenities.desc: Semi-private courtyard cabanas with showers, lockers, fridge, and TV. Located in the tennis courtyard.

amenities.title: Lockers
amenities.desc: Monthly locker rentals available in both the men's and women's locker rooms. Stop by the front desk to inquire.

amenities.title: Live Webcams
amenities.desc: Live webcam feeds of the Pickleball Stadium, Tennis Center, Gym, and facility entrances — viewable anytime.
